TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Oman u Oman sa i labu nu Ya-Cuo, itiza i 21 00 N, 57 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 309,500 sq km. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 309,500 sq km, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 0 sq km. hamin nu tademaw sa 3,355,262. kakalukan umah sa 4.70%, kilakilangan umah sa 0%, zumaay henay umah sa 95.30%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Muscat . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 18 bulad 11 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Qaboos bin Said al Said, micakat a demiad sa i 1970 a mihca pitu bulad tusa bataan izaw ku tulu demiad. likisi Oman u Arabian a subal nu mukasi a satenesay nu kanatal, kunyun nu ayawan tusa a malebut (2000) a mihcaan malingatu tu itini i bayuay atu i lala'ay anipisiwbayan asikawaw, mala Arabian subal tatelungan nu misanga'ay tu balungaan. kunyung pitu a seci mala Ala-puo-ti'kuo a kanatal. 11 . nikudan tu sabaw tu cacay a seci misiteked. cacay a malebut sepata a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku siwa (1429) a mihcaan Epate-ciw-pay tatengan patideng itini i A-man kumikuwanay. 1507 . cacay a malebut lima a lasubu idaw ku pitu (1507) Portugal midebun. cacay a malebut enem a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa (1649) a mihcaan muenengay itidaay a tademaw mibelin tu Putaw-ya a tademaw mikuwan, patideng tu Yali-pawan-caw . cacay a malebut pitu a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku tusa (1742) a mihcaan Puo-se a tademaw midebung. sabaw tu walu a seci nu cunye, bahbahen nu Arab a tedemaw ku Persia a tademaw, patideng tu Sayi-delwan-caw , pangangan han tu Mase-ke'te'-sudan kanatal , saka mala saicelangay nu India bayu a kanatalan. 1806ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu idaw ku enem (1806) a mihcaan Sayidel.epen.sueltan kasenusa mapatideng ku Sudan , itini i United Kingdom anipacukelan maluayaw demec ku Waha-pi-pay-mu'se-lin anipitebung, nikudan sa patideng tu saicelangay a cendu' , demecen nuheni ku India bayu nu saicelangan a Portugal , madebung nuheni ku Portugal nu Mozambique hami nu amisan a kakitidaan. 1834ŚĻī,Ť≥ĹÁĺ©Śĺ∑¬∑śú¨¬∑ . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1834) a mihcaan, SayiteI.pen.suektan , mabulaw ku tusu i Sanci-pa , singangan sa tu Sanci-pasu-tan-kuo . Oman mala india a bayu nu sakakaay, itini i Fa-cuo a satabakiyay nu banaw a mabulaway a kalung nu misiwbayay a sakasilaculan, yadah ku mabulaway nu luma taydan i Sanci-pa , Ing-kuo mihapu sa u kalung caay kaw tatengaay a sasiwbayan sa , Oman a wunmea malingatu masumad, Oman nu sakaudip malingatu mahetik, i buyuay a tademaw malingatu patideng tu kawaw, patideng tu Oman Islamkiw a tanayuay a kanatal. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1913) a mihcaan, Oman i buyuay a tademaw malingatu patideng tu sapaculi tu Ingkuo , patideng tu Oman-iselan-ciw . 20šłĖÁīÄŚąĚ, . tusa a bataan (20) a seci tu lingatu, Oman ciwcen kuo pasayda i Muscat misawacu. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan (1920) a mihcan Ingkuo itini i Muscat Oman sakakaay masasulit tu kiyaku tu "Sipu-tiaw-yue" , palutatdenga ciwcen misiteked, Oman masasu utiih malatusa cacay u Muscat Sudan kanatal atu Oman Islamkiw malatusa. 1932 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku tusa (1932) a mihcaan ci Taimu-el malasakakaay nu Sudan . cacay a malebut siwa lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa (1949) a mihcaan, ci Oman makaadih tu simal itini i kanatal, Ing-Kuo atu Muscat Sudan atu milihida tu Oman malingatu waca amabiyalaw. Ing-kuo mangalay itini i Oman miteka mikutkut tu simal. Paayaw tu Sudan Sayi-tel , itini i hedek nu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku sepat (1954) a mihcaan tu hedek patudu'an kuhitay nu Oman midebung, maalaw ku Ika-li' atu Luse-take' , cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku lima (1955) a mihcaan saba tu tusa a bulad atu sabaw tu lima a demiad milealaw tu Ciwcenkuo a suodu Nice-waw . 1957ŚĻī7 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku pitu (1957) a mihcaan pitu a bulad ciwlipu a sakakaay mililid mibelingnay tu Ing-Kuo mademic. cacay a malebut enem a lasubu idaw ku tusa (1962) a mihcaan, Ing-kuo atu Fa-kuo pangiha sakamu sa, patatenga tu Oman misitekeday a kanatal. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1965) a mihcaan timulan nu Cuofa-er a niyadu' patideng tu Cuofa-er tuni kasaupu nu tademaw , patideng tu sakalepacaw. 1967 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu (1967) a mihcaan Sutansayi'.tel.pentaimue pulungen nida ku niyadu', Mase-ke'te'-sutan a kanatal misumad tu ngangan mala Mase-ke'te' atu Omansu-tankuo . " ". Oman-Ise-lanciw-cenkuo nu patidengay nu masakaputay a "Oman papahutinan a hitay ťėŅśõľŤß£śĒĺŤĽć" , atu" Oman atu Puosewan nu masakaputay a hitayan . 1970ŚĻī7śúą23 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan (1970) a mihcaan pitu a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu a demiad a Taimu-er-sutan belinen nui labuay mikuli a tademaw, nu cacaya a wawaan tusa a bataan idaw ku suwa a mihcaan kapah milaylayay a tademaw ci kapu-se kumikuwanay, nuyda a mihcan walu a bulad siwa a demiad pangiha cinida misumad tu ngangan nu kanatal panganga sa u Omansu-tankuo han. . namahida,Oman tabaki kuni kasikawawan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1973) a mihcaan u Ing-kuo a hitay miales tu Oman . kamu Oman-sutan-kuo tada kamu nuheni u Ala-puo a kamu, u igu ku sakalecad a kamuan. Ala-puo a kamu u malamlamay a sasakamuen, nu tusaay a bataan idaw ku walu asasulidan nu sulit anikasasuala a sasakamuen. . Oman aniyaduay caay namin kaleca ku kamu nuheni, idaw ku duma a niyadu' akamu macalap nu Ila-ke' a tadakamun, idaw ku macalapty nu Puo-se a kamu atu In-ti' akamuan. . numa kaydaay i Sanci-pa a Oman nu hekalay a tademaw kakaduman ku Sewal-sili a kamu. iamisay nu dadipasan a kitidaan nu misiwbaya a tademaw, i nanumay a tademaw atu namakaydaay i Na-ya ta'lu nutawan a niyadu'ay nu tademaw musakamu tu Wu-eltu akamu. kakidaan kitidaan nu Oman idai Alapuo-pantaw a waliyan timulan nu kadu, amis, wali, timul bayubayuwan namin, mitepal tu Oman-wan atu Ala-puo a bayu, masa tanayu' ku dadipasan tanayu' han makaala tu cacay a malebut enme a lasubu (1600) a kuli, tada lala' nuheni makaala tu tulu a bataan tin siwa lima (30.95) a mang pinfan kunli, u Alapuo-pantaw nu satabakiay a sakatulu nu kanatal. . nutipan amisan atu Ala-puo pulung nu kanatal a kakenisan, nutipan atu Sawuti'-alapuo mababiyaw, nutipan timulan atu Ya-men malalidin, amisan idaw ku lala' hiyan nu Ala-puo lanhe ciucen a kanatal mibenis, silaad tu He'mu-cebayu atu I-lang masasuayaw. 130śĮęÁĪ≥. Tie' uo-sewan pasaydaay i Ingtu-yang u kacaledesan nu likelikenan a demiad. Pahua-kui-sin milakuuyt tu kanatal, lima„Äúcacay a bataan a bulad u kacaledesan, u caledes makaala tu sepat a bataan (40) a du kuni ka talakaw nu caledes, sabaw tu cacay ~ sepat a bulad u kasapi'an nu demiad, cypiwac han makaala tu cacay a bataan a du. pulung nu nikahetikan nu udad makaala tu cacay a lasubu tulu a bataan (130) hawmi.

sur~…ĺit anikasasuar~…ĺa a sasakamu…ôn. . oman anijaduaj ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶a ku kamu nuńß…ôni, idaw ku duma a nijadu Ē~ ° akamu ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu ir~…ĺa-k…ô Ē~ ° a tadakamun, idaw ku ma ¶ar~…ĺaptj nu puo-s…ô a kamu atu in-ti Ē~ ° akamuan. . numa kajdaaj i san ¶i-pa a oman nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw kakaduman ku s…ôwar~…ĺ-sir~…ĺi a kamu. iamisaj nu dadipasan a kitidaan nu misiwbaja a tad…ômaw, i nanumaj a tad…ômaw atu namakajdaaj i na-ja ta Ē~ °r~…ĺu nutawan a nijadu Ē~ °aj nu tad…ômaw musakamu tu wu-…ôr~…ĺtu akamu. kakidaan kitidaan nu oman idai ar~…ĺapuo-pantaw a war~…ĺijan timur~…ĺan nu kadu, amis, war~…ĺi, timur~…ĺ bajubajuwan namin, mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu oman-wan atu ar~…ĺa-puo a baju, masa tanaju Ē~ ° ku dadipasan tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ônm…ô a r~…ĺasubu (****) a kur~…ĺi, tada r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a bataan tin siwa r~…ĺima (**.**) a maŇč pinfan kunr~…ĺi, u ar~…ĺapuo-pantaw nu satabakiaj a sakatur~…ĺu nu kanatar~…ĺ. . nutipan amisan atu ar~…ĺa-puo pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ a kak…ônisan, nutipan atu sawuti Ē~ °-ar~…ĺapuo mababijaw, nutipan timur~…ĺan atu ja-m…ôn mar~…ĺar~…ĺidin, amisan idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßijan nu ar~…ĺa-puo r~…ĺanńß…ô ¶iu ¶…ôn a kanatar~…ĺ mib…ônis, sir~…ĺaad tu ńß…ô Ē~ °mu- ¶…ôbaju atu i-r~…ĺaŇč masasuajaw. *****. ti…ô Ē~ ° uo-s…ôwan pasajdaaj i iŇčtu-jaŇč u ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a d…ômiad. pańßua-kui-sin mir~…ĺakuujt tu kanatar~…ĺ, r~…ĺima* ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad u ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan, u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a bataan (**) a du kuni ka tar~…ĺakaw nu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj ~ s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad u kasapi Ē~ °an nu d…ômiad, ¶jpiwa ¶ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a du. pur~…ĺuŇč nu nikańß…ôtikan nu udad makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan (***) ńßawmi.
S.FORM: Oman u Oman sa i labu nu Ya-Cuo, itiza i 21 00 N, 57 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 309,500 sq km. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 309,500 sq km, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 0 sq km. hamin nu tademaw sa 3,355,262. kakalukan umah sa 4.70%, kilakilangan umah sa 0%, zumaay henay umah sa 95.30%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Muscat . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 18 bulad 11 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Qaboos bin Said al Said, micakat a demiad sa i 1970 a mihca pitu bulad tusa bataan izaw ku tulu demiad. likisi Oman u Arabian a subal nu mukasi a satenesay nu kanatal, kunyun nu ayawan tusa a malebut (2000) a mihcaan malingatu tu itini i bayuay atu i lala'ay anipisiwbayan asikawaw, mala Arabian subal tatelungan nu misanga'ay tu balungaan. kunyung pitu a seci mala Ala-puo-ti'kuo a kanatal. 11 . nikudan tu sabaw tu cacay a seci misiteked. cacay a malebut sepata a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku siwa (1429) a mihcaan Epate-ciw-pay tatengan patideng itini i A-man kumikuwanay. 1507 . cacay a malebut lima a lasubu idaw ku pitu (1507) Portugal midebun. cacay a malebut enem a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa (1649) a mihcaan muenengay itidaay a tademaw mibelin tu Putaw-ya a tademaw mikuwan, patideng tu Yali-pawan-caw . cacay a malebut pitu a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku tusa (1742) a mihcaan Puo-se a tademaw midebung. sabaw tu walu a seci nu cunye, bahbahen nu Arab a tedemaw ku Persia a tademaw, patideng tu Sayi-delwan-caw , pangangan han tu Mase-ke'te'-sudan kanatal , saka mala saicelangay nu India bayu a kanatalan. 1806ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu idaw ku enem (1806) a mihcaan Sayidel.epen.sueltan kasenusa mapatideng ku Sudan , itini i United Kingdom anipacukelan maluayaw demec ku Waha-pi-pay-mu'se-lin anipitebung, nikudan sa patideng tu saicelangay a cendu' , demecen nuheni ku India bayu nu saicelangan a Portugal , madebung nuheni ku Portugal nu Mozambique hami nu amisan a kakitidaan. 1834ŚĻī,Ť≥ĹÁĺ©Śĺ∑¬∑śú¨¬∑ . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1834) a mihcaan, SayiteI.pen.suektan , mabulaw ku tusu i Sanci-pa , singangan sa tu Sanci-pasu-tan-kuo . Oman mala india a bayu nu sakakaay, itini i Fa-cuo a satabakiyay nu banaw a mabulaway a kalung nu misiwbayay a sakasilaculan, yadah ku mabulaway nu luma taydan i Sanci-pa , Ing-kuo mihapu sa u kalung caay kaw tatengaay a sasiwbayan sa , Oman a wunmea malingatu masumad, Oman nu sakaudip malingatu mahetik, i buyuay a tademaw malingatu patideng tu kawaw, patideng tu Oman Islamkiw a tanayuay a kanatal. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1913) a mihcaan, Oman i buyuay a tademaw malingatu patideng tu sapaculi tu Ingkuo , patideng tu Oman-iselan-ciw . 20šłĖÁīÄŚąĚ, . tusa a bataan (20) a seci tu lingatu, Oman ciwcen kuo pasayda i Muscat misawacu. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan (1920) a mihcan Ingkuo itini i Muscat Oman sakakaay masasulit tu kiyaku tu "Sipu-tiaw-yue" , palutatdenga ciwcen misiteked, Oman masasu utiih malatusa cacay u Muscat Sudan kanatal atu Oman Islamkiw malatusa. 1932 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku tusa (1932) a mihcaan ci Taimu-el malasakakaay nu Sudan . cacay a malebut siwa lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa (1949) a mihcaan, ci Oman makaadih tu simal itini i kanatal, Ing-Kuo atu Muscat Sudan atu milihida tu Oman malingatu waca amabiyalaw. Ing-kuo mangalay itini i Oman miteka mikutkut tu simal. Paayaw tu Sudan Sayi-tel , itini i hedek nu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku sepat (1954) a mihcaan tu hedek patudu'an kuhitay nu Oman midebung, maalaw ku Ika-li' atu Luse-take' , cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku lima (1955) a mihcaan saba tu tusa a bulad atu sabaw tu lima a demiad milealaw tu Ciwcenkuo a suodu Nice-waw . 1957ŚĻī7 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku pitu (1957) a mihcaan pitu a bulad ciwlipu a sakakaay mililid mibelingnay tu Ing-Kuo mademic. cacay a malebut enem a lasubu idaw ku tusa (1962) a mihcaan, Ing-kuo atu Fa-kuo pangiha sakamu sa, patatenga tu Oman misitekeday a kanatal. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1965) a mihcaan timulan nu Cuofa-er a niyadu' patideng tu Cuofa-er tuni kasaupu nu tademaw , patideng tu sakalepacaw. 1967 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu (1967) a mihcaan Sutansayi'.tel.pentaimue pulungen nida ku niyadu', Mase-ke'te'-sutan a kanatal misumad tu ngangan mala Mase-ke'te' atu Omansu-tankuo . " ". Oman-Ise-lanciw-cenkuo nu patidengay nu masakaputay a "Oman papahutinan a hitay ťėŅśõľŤß£śĒĺŤĽć" , atu" Oman atu Puosewan nu masakaputay a hitayan . 1970ŚĻī7śúą23 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan (1970) a mihcaan pitu a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu a demiad a Taimu-er-sutan belinen nui labuay mikuli a tademaw, nu cacaya a wawaan tusa a bataan idaw ku suwa a mihcaan kapah milaylayay a tademaw ci kapu-se kumikuwanay, nuyda a mihcan walu a bulad siwa a demiad pangiha cinida misumad tu ngangan nu kanatal panganga sa u Omansu-tankuo han. . namahida,Oman tabaki kuni kasikawawan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1973) a mihcaan u Ing-kuo a hitay miales tu Oman . kamu Oman-sutan-kuo tada kamu nuheni u Ala-puo a kamu, u igu ku sakalecad a kamuan. Ala-puo a kamu u malamlamay a sasakamuen, nu tusaay a bataan idaw ku walu asasulidan nu sulit anikasasuala a sasakamuen. . Oman aniyaduay caay namin kaleca ku kamu nuheni, idaw ku duma a niyadu' akamu macalap nu Ila-ke' a tadakamun, idaw ku macalapty nu Puo-se a kamu atu In-ti' akamuan. . numa kaydaay i Sanci-pa a Oman nu hekalay a tademaw kakaduman ku Sewal-sili a kamu. iamisay nu dadipasan a kitidaan nu misiwbaya a tademaw, i nanumay a tademaw atu namakaydaay i Na-ya ta'lu nutawan a niyadu'ay nu tademaw musakamu tu Wu-eltu akamu. kakidaan kitidaan nu Oman idai Alapuo-pantaw a waliyan timulan nu kadu, amis, wali, timul bayubayuwan namin, mitepal tu Oman-wan atu Ala-puo a bayu, masa tanayu' ku dadipasan tanayu' han makaala tu cacay a malebut enme a lasubu (1600) a kuli, tada lala' nuheni makaala tu tulu a bataan tin siwa lima (30.95) a mang pinfan kunli, u Alapuo-pantaw nu satabakiay a sakatulu nu kanatal. . nutipan amisan atu Ala-puo pulung nu kanatal a kakenisan, nutipan atu Sawuti'-alapuo mababiyaw, nutipan timulan atu Ya-men malalidin, amisan idaw ku lala' hiyan nu Ala-puo lanhe ciucen a kanatal mibenis, silaad tu He'mu-cebayu atu I-lang masasuayaw. 130śĮęÁĪ≥. Tie' uo-sewan pasaydaay i Ingtu-yang u kacaledesan nu likelikenan a demiad. Pahua-kui-sin milakuuyt tu kanatal, lima„Äúcacay a bataan a bulad u kacaledesan, u caledes makaala tu sepat a bataan (40) a du kuni ka talakaw nu caledes, sabaw tu cacay ~ sepat a bulad u kasapi'an nu demiad, cypiwac han makaala tu cacay a bataan a du. pulung nu nikahetikan nu udad makaala tu cacay a lasubu tulu a bataan (130) hawmi.

r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a d…ômiad. pańßua-kui-sin mir~…ĺakuujt tu kanatar~…ĺ, r~…ĺima* ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad u ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan, u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a bataan (**) a du kuni ka r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan (***) ńßawmi.
